name: Chicken Packets
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chicken, cream cheese, chives, milk, and salt in a medium bowl using hands.
Store the filling in a 1-quart freezer bag.
2. Place crouton crumbs in another 1-quart bag and freeze with the chicken filling.
3. Refrigerate crescent rolls (or butter crescents).
4. To prepare for serving, thaw the chicken mixture.
5. Unroll the crescent rolls; each roll contains 4 rectangles separated by a diagonal perforation.
6. Press dough along each perforation so the rectangles do not separate.
7. Place about 1/4 cup of chicken filling into the center of each rectangle.
8. Fold dough over the filling and pinch the edges to seal tightly.
9. Dip packets in melted butter and coat with crouton crumbs.
10. Place packets on a baking sheet.
11. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Packets are good hot or cold.
If using homemade crescent roll recipe:
1. Make the packets up to baking time, place each in a fold-close sandwich bag, and freeze.
2. To serve, thaw for 30 minutes to an hour, then bake as directed.
